title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Guardian Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Guardian Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!
